item.title: 如何在 jQuery 中获取多个复选框的值 | How To Get Multiple Checkbox Value In jQuery
item.description:
在本文中，我们将看到如何在 jquery 中获取多个复选框的值。 在这里，我们将学习使用 jquery 获取选中的复选框值。

我们将为复选框和单选按钮使用 :checked 选择器。 它可以检索复选框的选定值。

单击复选框时，我们将使用 push() 函数将值推送到数组中。

那么，让我们看看在 jquery 中获取选中的复选框值，在 javascript 中多个复选框选中的值，以及如何在 jquery 中使用数组获取多个复选框值。

例子：

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <title>How To Get Multiple Checkbox Value In jQuery</title> <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-1.12.4.min.js"></script> </head> <body> <form> <h3>Select languages:</h3> <label><input type="checkbox" value="laravel" name="language"> Laravel </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="php" name="language"> PHP </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="jquery" name="language"> jQuery </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="javascript" name="language"> JavaScript </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="react" name="language"> React </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="angular" name="language"> Angular </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="python" name="language"> Python </label> <br> <button type="button">Get Selected Values</button> </form> <script> $(document).ready(function() { $("button").click(function(){ var arr = []; $.each($("input[name='language']:checked"), function(){ arr.push($(this).val()); }); alert("Your selected languages are: " + arr.join(", ")); }); }); </script> </body> </html>

输出：

一旦暂停，techsolutionstuff 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，techsolutionstuff 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，techsolutionstuff 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 techsolutionstuff 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 techsolutionstuff：

降低 techsolutionstuff 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

不屈不挠的 techsolutionstuff 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

In this article, we will see how to get multiple checkbox values in jquery. Here, we will learn to get the selected checkbox values using jquery.

We will use the :checked selector for checkboxes and radio buttons. It can retrieve the selected value of the checkbox.

When clicking on the checkbox we will push the value in the array using the push() function.

So, let's see get selected checkbox values in jquery, multiple checkbox checked values in javascript, and how to get multiple checkbox values in jquery using an array.

Example:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<title>How To Get Multiple Checkbox Value In jQuery</title>
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-1.12.4.min.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
    <form>
        <h3>Select languages:</h3>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="laravel" name="language"> Laravel </label>        
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="php" name="language"> PHP </label>        
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="jquery" name="language"> jQuery </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="javascript" name="language"> JavaScript </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="react" name="language"> React </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="angular" name="language"> Angular </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="python" name="language"> Python </label>
        <br>
        <button type="button">Get Selected Values</button>
    </form>
  <script>
      $(document).ready(function() {
          $("button").click(function(){
              var arr = [];
              $.each($("input[name='language']:checked"), function(){
                  arr.push($(this).val());
              });
              alert("Your selected languages are: " + arr.join(", "));
          });
      });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

Output:

☝️ Check out this all-time classic DEV post

Once suspended, techsolutionstuff will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, techsolutionstuff will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by techsolutionstuff will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If techsolutionstuff is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag techsolutionstuff:

Make all posts by techsolutionstuff less visible

techsolutionstuff consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging techsolutionstuff will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: techsolutionstuff

item.title: Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator 的 3 大优势 | 3 Incredible Benefits of Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator
item.description:
任何公用事业公司都会告诉您，管理其客户和资产对于保持其运营平稳运行至关重要。 为客户开具账单、维护资产以及为其主要资源（可能是天然气、水或他们管理的任何其他服务）收取用户费用都属于该业务的范围。 他们将稳定性、精确性和效率确立为他们对解决方案和雇用他们的公司的期望的三大支柱。 因此，他们希望保护他们的公司免受任何规模变化发生时的影响。

实现企业目标的秘诀在于确保解决方案满足您现在和未来的需求。 测试，尤其是 Opkey 测试自动化平台是大多数人使用的机制。 无论使用何种技术或程序，测试都是一项昂贵的操作。 它需要测试计划、测试设计和测试构造或执行。 这需要时间和金钱，而且危险程度因方法而异。 所有测试材料都必须创建，甚至可能需要从头开始重新创建，因为该工具仅适用于测试自动化程序。 作为受支持的 Oracle Utilities 产品和版本许可的一部分，Oracle 提供了一个完整的预构建资产集合，称为 Oracle Utilities Testing Accelerator。 此外，为了显着加快业务流程建模技术，在 Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator 的帮助下，基于 Oracle Utilities Reference Model 预构建、随时可用的资产。 因此，与采用和持续维护相关的成本大大降低。

  • 解决方案是一组以实用程序为中心的程序，可以以创造性的方式应用这些程序来执行业务任务。 这些操作方法描述了某个公用事业公司如何使用解决方案来实现其目标。 通过建模使您的测试与您的业务流程相匹配是使测试有效并立即对公司有用的关键策略。 可以使用 Oracle Utilities Testing Accelerator 针对业务流程对测试进行相关建模。

  • 人生只有不断的变化。 测试资产的更新是使用 Oracle Utilities Testing Accelerator 进行的，无需在每次升级时进行重新设计。 无论更新哪个版本，这都降低了它们之间升级的价格和风险。 让用户更快地从平台中受益的能力是存在这种能力的主要原因之一。

    • 在采用解决方案的过程中，测试是一笔巨大的开支。 有几种方法可用于减少安装和维护的费用和危险，但每种方法都有优点和缺点。 您可以通过使用 Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator 有效地确保您的公司流程在升级后继续平稳运行，从而最大限度地发挥您的投资收益。 在测试方面，Opkey 是最好的公司之一。 人们应该使用它以获得最佳结果。

    永恒的开发帖子...

    我多年前就希望知道的 Git 概念

    开发人员使用最多的技术不是 Javascript。

    它不是 Python 或 HTML。

    它甚至很少在面试中被提及或被列为工作的先决条件。

    当然，我说的是 Git 和版本控制。

    一旦暂停，rohitbhandari102 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    解除暂停后，rohitbhandari102 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，rohitbhandari102 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 rohitbhandari102 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 rohitbhandari102 的方法：

    降低 rohitbhandari102 的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    取消标记 rohitbhandari102 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:


    Any utility will tell you that managing its customers and assets is essential to keep its operations running smoothly. Billing customers, maintaining assets, and collecting user fees for their principal resource—which might be gas, water, or any other service they manage—all fall under the purview of that business. They establish stability, precision, and efficiency as the three pillars of what they expect from their solutions and the companies that employ them. They, therefore, want to protect their company against the impacts of any size shift when it occurs.

    The secret to achieving corporate goals is making sure the solution satisfies your needs both now and also in the future. Testing, particularly Opkey test automation platform is the mechanism that most people use. Regardless of the technology or procedures utilised, testing is an expensive operation. It entails test planning, test design, and test construction or execution. This takes time and money, and the danger level varies depending on the approach. The Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator takes a novel method to lower testing costs and risks:

    • All test materials must be created, and they may even need to be recreated from scratch because the tool is only available for test automation procedures. As part of the licensing for supported Oracle Utilities products and versions, Oracle provides a full collection of prebuilt assets known as the Oracle Utilities Testing Accelerator. Additionally, to significantly speed up the business process modelling technique, With the help of the Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator, prebuilt, ready-to-use assets based on the Oracle Utilities Reference Model. The costs associated with adoption and continuing maintenance are greatly reduced as a result.

    • Solutions are a collection of utility-focused procedures that may be applied in creative ways to carry out business tasks. These operational methods describe how a certain utility employs the solution to meet its goals. Making your tests match your business processes through modelling is a key tactic for making testing effective and instantly useful to a firm. Tests may be relevantly modelled against business processes using Oracle Utilities Testing Accelerator.

    • Life’s only constant changes. The goal of the Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator is to reduce the expenses associated with change. Updates to test assets are made using the Oracle Utilities Testing Accelerator without the need for redesign as part of each upgrade. No matter which versions are updated, this lowers the price and risk of upgrading between them. The capacity to let users benefit from the platform much more quickly is one of the main reasons for the presence of this kind of capability.

    Testing is a substantial expense in the adoption of solutions. There are several approaches that may be used to reduce the expense and danger of installing and maintaining, but each has benefits and drawbacks. You may maximise the benefits of your investment by using the Oracle Utility Testing Accelerator to effectively make sure that your company processes continue to run smoothly even after upgrades. Opkey is one of the best companies when it comes to testing. People should use it in order to get the best results.

    Timeless DEV post...

    Git Concepts I Wish I Knew Years Ago

    The most used technology by developers is not Javascript.

    It's not Python or HTML.

    It hardly even gets mentioned in interviews or listed as a pre-requisite for jobs.

    I'm talking about Git and version control of course.

    Jordi Henrique Silva - Dec 14 '22

    Ingo Steinke - Dec 14 '22

    Prarup Gurung - Dec 14 '22

    Once suspended, rohitbhandari102 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, rohitbhandari102 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by rohitbhandari102 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If rohitbhandari102 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag rohitbhandari102:

    Make all posts by rohitbhandari102 less visible

    rohitbhandari102 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging rohitbhandari102 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: rohitbhandari102

item.title: 达美航空延误赔偿小贴士 | Tips for Delay compensation from Delta Airlines
item.description:
英里瑞安

发表于 1 月 19 日

航班延误并不是什么新鲜事； 然而，这些事情常常给乘客带来不便。 但是，有一些条件可以申请达美航班延误赔偿。 另一方面，航空公司有几项政策可以为您提供帮助。

它是世界上历史最悠久且仍在运营的航空公司，提供非凡的旅行体验。 航空公司提供其他设施，例如达美航空飞行里程，因为这些是为常旅客提供的。

但是，这些不会过期，但在某些情况下该帐户可能会被停用。

以下是获得航班延误赔偿的步骤：

您可能已经观察到，每当航班取消或延误时，乘客都会丢弃他们的证件。 然而，这是一个很大的错误，当他们申请延迟赔偿时才意识到。 因此，您需要妥善保管这些文件，以便在需要时使用它们。

  1. 尽量保持冷静：通常，在这些情况下，当人们无法获得达美航班延误补偿时，他们会失去冷静。 因此，建议耐心等待并了解整个情况。 如果你倾听另一方的意见，那会有所帮助，然后你就会了解其他事情。
  2. 找到合适的人：现在，如果你不知道合适的人来讨论延误补偿，你必须面临多重挑战。 但是，最好找到合适的部门和可以帮助您获得退款的相关人员。
  3. 获取航空公司的通知：航空公司会及时通知您有关航班延误、取消和改道的信息。 但是，这些步骤也是为了避免提供延误航班补偿。

多个来源可以帮助你，比如在登机口标志上显示更新，然后是航班信息显示屏。 但是，如果您还跟踪航班状态，将会有所帮助。

  1. 搭乘下一班航班：如果您遇到航班延误、取消和其他操作，您将被预订到下一班航班。 但是，航空公司应该只让您登上另一趟航班。

航空公司还将安排在同一航班上重新安排您的托运行李。 另一方面，连接达美航空 Book A Flight服务台可提供最便宜的航班等等。

  1. 帮助解决过夜延误：有时，航班取消或延误会造成过夜不便。 但达美航空公司从不在中途离开乘客。 但是，航空公司将为您提供酒店住宿。

如果没有任何住宿，它会以高达 100 美元的价格为您提供交通信用。

如何管理航空公司的延误情况？

如果你被航空公司的延误困住了，这取决于达美的延误补偿方案。 如果您选择继续飞行，请申请货币补偿。

另一方面，您也可以与达美航空公司的现场代表交谈，并尝试获取更多相关信息。 每当您需要时，航空公司都会提供解决方案。 此外，其他几项功能让您的旅行更加精彩。

解释达美航空公司的航班延误政策。

除上述选项外，达美航班延误政策还引入了各种可帮助您获得退款的参数。 另一方面，有几个条件可以帮助您随时随地轻松更改航班。

一旦暂停，milesry100 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，milesry100 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，milesry100 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 milesry100 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 milesry100 的方法：

降低 milesry100 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 milesry100 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

miles ryan

Posted on Jan 19

There is nothing new if a flight gets delayed; however, these things often inconvenience the passengers. But, there are some conditions to claim a Delta Flight Delay compensation. On the other hand, the airline has several policies for your help.

It's the oldest airline in the world & still in operation that offers an extraordinary trip. Airlines offer other facilities, such as Delta sky miles, as these are for frequent flyers.

However, these don't expire, but the account can get deactivated in certain cases.

**

Here are the steps to get compensation for the flight delay:

** 1.Retain the documents:

You might have observed the passengers discard their documents whenever their flight gets cancelled or delayed. However, it is a big mistake & realised when they filed for the delay compensation. So, you need to keep these documents safe so you can use them when required.

  1. Try to be calm: Usually, in these situations, people lose their cool when they cannot get their Delta Flight Delay Compensation. So, it's been advised to be patient & understand the whole situation. It would help if you listened to the other side, & then you'll come to know the other things.
  2. Get to the right person: Now, if you are unaware of the right person to discuss the delay compensation, you must face multiple challenges. However, it'll be better to find out the right department & the concerned person who can help you to get the refund.
  3. Get informed by the airline: The airline keeps you informed about flight delays, cancellations, and diversions. However, these steps are also taken to avoid offering delayed flight compensation.

Multiple sources can help you with it, like displaying the updates on the boarding gate signs followed by the flight information display screen. However, it would help if you also track the flight status.

  1. Get on the next flight: If you ever experience a flight delay, cancellation & other operations, you'll get booked on the next flight. However, it should happen by the airlines that only you'll get on board the other flight.

The airline will also arrange to reroute your checked baggage on the same flight. On the other hand, connecting with Delta Airlines Book A Flight desk provides the cheapest flights & much more.

  1. Help for the overnight delays: Sometimes, flight cancellation or delay causes overnight inconvenience. But Delta Air Lines never leaves the passengers during the midways. However, the airlines will provide you with hotel accommodation.

If there isn't any accommodation available, it offers you transportation credit at the rate of upto $100.

How to manage the airlines delay situations?

If you get stuck with the airlines' delay, it depends on the Delta delay compensation packages. If you choose to go ahead with the flight, claim the monetary compensation.

On the other hand, you can also speak to the Delta Airlines live representative & try to get some more information about it. The airlines provide a solution every time whenever you need it. Moreover, several other features make your trip more amazing.

Explain the flight delay policy by the Delta Air lines.

Apart from the above options, the Delta flight delay policy introduces various parameters that can help you get the refund. On the other hand, there are several conditions that help for a hassle free flight change anytime & anywhere.

item.title: Sitecore 开发服务 | Sitecore Development Services
item.description:
这可能包括创建自定义模块和组件、与第三方系统集成以及构建自定义工作流和业务逻辑。

开发团队可以创建连接器和集成，将这些系统中的数据导入 Sitecore 并将其显示在网站或应用程序上。

这可以包括创建线框、模型和用户流程来指导开发过程。

这可以包括优化页面标题、元描述和图像，以及创建和优化内容。

这可以包括缩小 CSS 和 JS、使用缓存和实施图像优化技术。

通过 Sourceved聘请技能高超且经验丰富的 Sitecore 开发人员。



原文:

Sitecore development services generally include the following:

1. Customization: Sitecore's platform is highly customizable, and development teams can use it to build unique websites and digital experiences tailored to the specific needs of a client. This can include creating custom modules and components, integrating with third-party systems, and building custom workflows and business logic.

2. Integration: Sitecore can be integrated with a variety of external systems, such as CRM, ERP, and analytics platforms. Development teams can create connectors and integrations to bring data from these systems into Sitecore and display it on the website or application.

3. Ongoing Maintenance and Support: Once a website or application is built, it will require ongoing maintenance and support to ensure it remains up-to-date and secure. Sitecore development partners or in-house development teams can provide ongoing support and maintenance services to keep the website or application running smoothly.

4. User Experience Design: Sitecore development services also include UX design, which is the process of designing the overall look and feel of the website or application, as well as its usability and functionality. This can include creating wireframes, mockups, and user flows to guide the development process.

5. Sitecore Upgrade: Sitecore regularly releases new versions of the platform and development teams can help to upgrade the website or application to the latest version, ensuring that the client takes advantage of the latest features and security updates.

6. SEO Optimization: Sitecore development teams can also work on SEO Optimization, which helps websites and applications to rank higher on search engines. This can include optimizing page titles, meta descriptions, and images, as well as creating and optimizing content.

7. Performance Optimization: Sitecore development teams can also work on Performance Optimization, which helps websites and applications to load faster and perform better. This can include minifying CSS and JS, using caching, and implementing image optimization techniques.

Sourceved Technologies Pvt Ltd is a leading Sitecore Development Company with extensive experience in CMS-based Solution Development Services. Hire Sitecore Developers highly skilled and experienced through Sourceved.
item.author: sourcevedreal

item.title: 59.螺旋矩阵II | 59. Spiral Matrix II
item.description:
严厉的拉杰帕尔

发表于 1 月 19 日

问题陈述：

给定一个正整数 n，生成一个 nxn 矩阵，其中元素按螺旋顺序从 1 到 n2 填充。

示例 1：
输入： n = 3
输出： [[1,2,3],[8,9,4],[7,6,5]]

示例 2：
输入： n = 1
约束：

解决方案：

算法：

  1. 创建一个大小为 nx n 的矩阵。
  2. 初始化 left = 0, right = n - 1, top = 0, bottom = n - 1, num = 1
  3. 当 left <= right 和 top <= bottom 时迭代。 返回矩阵。

代码：

 public class Solution { public int[][] generateMatrix(int n){ int[][] matrix = new int[n][n]; int left = 0; int right = n - 1; int top = 0; int bottom = n - 1; int num = 1; while(left <= right && top <= bottom){ for(int i = left; i <= right; i++){ matrix[top][i] = num++; } top++; for(int i = top; i <= bottom; i++){ matrix[i][right] = num++; } right--; for(int i = right; i >= left; i--){ matrix[bottom][i] = num++; } bottom--; for(int i = bottom; i >= top; i--){ matrix[i][left] = num++; } left++; } } }

时间复杂度：
空间复杂度：
丹尼尔尤努斯 - 22 年 10 月 30 日

一旦暂停，harshrajpal 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，harshrajpal 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，harshrajpal 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 harshrajpal 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 harshrajpal：

降低 harshrajpal 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 harshrajpal 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Harsh Rajpal

Posted on Jan 19

Problem Statement:

Given a positive integer n, generate an n x n matrix filled with elements from 1 to n2 in spiral order.

Example 1:
Input: n = 3
Output: [[1,2,3],[8,9,4],[7,6,5]]

Example 2:
Input: n = 1
*Output: *[[1]]

Constraints:

Solution:

Algorithm:

  1. Create a matrix of size n x n.
  2. Initialize left = 0, right = n - 1, top = 0, bottom = n - 1, num = 1
  3. Iterate while left <= right and top <= bottom. a) Iterate from left to right and fill the top row with num. b) Increment top. c) Iterate from top to bottom and fill the right column with num. d) Decrement right. e) Iterate from right to left and fill the bottom row with num. f) Decrement bottom. g) Iterate from bottom to top and fill the left column with num. h) Increment left.
  4. Return matrix.

Code:

public class Solution {
    public int[][] generateMatrix(int n){
        int[][] matrix = new int[n][n];
        int left = 0;
        int right = n - 1;
        int top = 0;
        int bottom = n - 1;
        int num = 1;
        while(left <= right && top <= bottom){
            for(int i = left; i <= right; i++){
                matrix[top][i] = num++;
            }
            top++;
            for(int i = top; i <= bottom; i++){
                matrix[i][right] = num++;
            }
            right--;
            for(int i = right; i >= left; i--){
                matrix[bottom][i] = num++;
            }
            bottom--;
            for(int i = bottom; i >= top; i--){
                matrix[i][left] = num++;
            }
            left++;
        }
    }
}

Time Complexity:
O(N^2)

Space Complexity:
O(N^2)

Sameh Muhammed - Oct 10 '22

Daniel Yunus - Oct 30 '22

item.author: harshrajpal

item.title: 云采用的安全方面 | Security Aspects for cloud adoption
item.description:
兰吉西杜

发表于 1 月 19 日

大家好，我将开始一系列新的博客，在这些博客中，我将提高人们对在云采用过程中面临或忽视安全性的各种安全问题/担忧/挑战的认识。 如今，尽管对各种组织有很多意识或攻击，但有时在采用云的过程中仍会忽视安全性，这似乎是公司犯下的最大错误，或者由于预算限制，他们推迟了这些安全活动并降低了优先级走向安全。 但总的来说，这是公司在云采用阶段忽视安全方面或降低安全优先级所犯的最大错误之一。 在采用云之前以及迁移到云之后都应考虑安全性这一点非常重要，以避免任何可能成为云采用障碍或主要风险的相关问题。 在主要情况下，由于预算问题而忽略了安全性，但我看到很多情况下，当他们考虑在后期包括安全性时，由于其他问题或担忧，费用会在很大程度上增加。 因此，它建议从第一天开始，安全应与其他活动保持相同的优先级，以避免与法规、合规性等相关的许多问题。在本系列中，我将介绍在第一天应考虑的所有安全方面的内容云采用，在选择云服务提供商之前应考虑的所有事项，关于您现有的安全框架应牢记的所有事项，并基于所有这些考虑，创建一个步骤列表，应根据该列表选择目标云服务提供商.

我将使这些博客简短，以保持它们的趣味性。

感谢您阅读博客，希望这能帮助您增长知识。

一旦暂停，ranjitsidhu180 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，ranjitsidhu180 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ranjitsidhu180 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ranjitsidhu180 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 ranjitsidhu180 的方法：

降低 ranjitsidhu180 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ranjitsidhu180 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ranjit Sidhu

Posted on Jan 19

Hello Everyone, I am going to start a new series of blogs where I am going to create awareness about the various security issues/concerns/challenges that are being faced or security is being neglected during the cloud adoption process. These days inspite of lot of awareness or attacks on various organizations, still sometimes security is being neglected during the process of cloud adoption and this seems to be the biggest mistake that companies do or due to budget constraints they delay these security activities and decrease the priority towards security. But overall this is one of the biggest mistakes that companies do to neglect the security aspects or decrease the security priority during cloud adoption phases. This is very important that security should be considered before adopting the cloud and also after moving to the cloud to avoid any issues related that can be a roadblock or major risk in cloud adoption. In major cases security is neglected due to budget issues, but I have seen many cases when they think about including the security at later stage then the expenses grow to large extent due to other issues or concerns. So its recommended the from day one, security should be kept at the same priority as other activities to avoid many issues related to regulations, compliance etc. In this series, I will present the content what all security aspects should be considered during initial days of cloud adoption, what all should be considered before selecting the cloud service provider, what all things should be kept in mind about your existing security framework and based on all these consideration, creating a list of steps based on which target cloud service provider should be selected.

I will keep these blogs short to keep them interesting.

Thanks for reading the blog, I hope this will help you increasing your knowledge.

Franck Pachot - Nov 25 '22

Jim Zandueta - Dec 24 '22

Yusuf Adeyemo - Dec 24 '22

Stephen Sennett - Dec 23 '22
